calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-04-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:28am
Judge Pro Tem Roger Sleight, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Mei Fang Lisa Zhang present with counsel Henry Hu sbn 164165. Marian Kong interprets English/Mandarin and Mandarin/English on behalf of the Appellant. Respondent, Li Rong Chen is present with counsel Karen Uchiyama sbn 154414. Witnesses Qin Zhu and Nelson Tang present on behalf of the Appellant. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Roger Sleight.

Case heard concurrently with CSM-11-836622. Please see minutes for that case.

12:44pm
Exhibits retained. Case submitted.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Continued To Sep-15-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 414
MINI MINUTES: 12:35pm
Judge Pro Tem Roger Sleight, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Mei Fang Lisa Zhang present with counsel Henry Hu, sbn 164165. Marian Kong interprets Mandarin/English and English/Mandarin on behalf of Appellant. Respondent, Nancy Jen present with counsel Karen Uchiyama, sbn 154414. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Roger Sleight.

12:45PM
No Exhibits retained. Case submitted.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-30-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: 10:12 AM
Judge Pro Tem Roger Sleight, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal heard concurrently with case # 836634. Appellant, Mei Fang Lisa Zhang present with counsel, Henry Hu, sbn 164165. Respondent, Nancy Jen present in pro per. Respondent Li Rong Chen present in pro per (836634). Bernard Leung testifies as a witness for Appellant. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Roger Sleight.

10:44 AM Court calls for 5 minute recess

10:55 AM Court resumes

Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Roger Sleight. Appeallant Mei Fang Lisa Zhang as witness and testifies re: service.

11:28 AM
No Exhibits retained. Case Submitted.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-28-2011 Judgment Entered
